mentions.note: Mega IPO driving massive cash raises by other tech firms. Won't fast-track into S&P 500 (stays under 1-year rule + profitability requirement). May not achieve profitability soon given heavy Starship/Starlink/AI infrastructure investments. Supply deluge from IPO is crushing broader market.

Mega IPO coming summer; valuation jumped $800B→$1.25T→$2T+ in 18 months; likely $75B raise at 2T valuation = sliver deal; 7–8 years of IPO volume in months; expect initial roar then 6-month painful correction.
